content: Hello! I'm Felipe Restrepo, a Software Engineer based in Medellín, Colombia. I have over 7 years of experience as a full-stack developer, specializing in building and maintaining production systems using technologies like Python, JavaScript, Docker, and cloud services like AWS and Azure. I'm passionate about leveraging technology to create impactful solutions and enjoy working in collaborative environments. How can I assist you today?

I was born in 1995, which makes me 31 years old. My background includes a degree in Civil Engineering and I'm currently specializing in Artificial Intelligence. If you're interested in discussing my professional experience or projects, feel free to ask!

You're right! I apologize for the mix-up. Given my birth year of 1995, I am indeed 31 as of 2026. Thank you for your understanding! If you have any more questions about my experience or skills, I'd be happy to discuss.
